Construction Equipment
Transport

Southeast Michigan's owner-operated heavy haul fleet. Semi trucks with Landoll trailers — SkyTraks, telehandlers, excavators, and construction machinery moved between job sites. Same-day dispatch available.

Dispatch

Capabilities

What We Move

Telehandlers & SkyTraks

With attachments, man boxes, and forks. We operate these machines — we know how to load and secure them.

Skid Steers & Track Loaders

Compact track loaders, skid steers, and mini equipment. Loaded by machine on deck.

Excavators

Mini excavators through mid-size. CAT, Kubota, John Deere, Case — we've moved them all.

Forklifts & Rough Terrain

Warehouse forklifts, rough terrain forklifts, and all-terrain units between sites and equipment yards.

Scissor & Boom Lifts

Aerial work platforms, scissor lifts, articulating boom lifts. Full securing and tie-down protocol.

Containers & Oversized

Shipping containers, storage units, gang boxes, job boxes, and oversized loads up to 40,000 lbs.

Our Equipment

The Fleet

Freightliner with Kalyn Siebert Landoll Trailer
Excavator + Boom Lift — Subdivision Move

Multi-Vehicle Transport
15+ TrucksSemis, flatbeds, and recovery units
DOT AuthorizedUSDOT #2573313 · MC #1690083
Fully InsuredCargo, liability, workers' comp. COI on request.
Flint-BasedLocal dispatch — fastest response in Mid-Michigan
For Purchasing Managers

Builder & Contractor Services

We provide dedicated equipment transport for residential and commercial construction operations across Southeast Michigan. Our fleet handles recurring scheduled routes between subdivisions, equipment yards, and job sites — not one-off calls from a dispatch board.

  • Dedicated equipment moves for active job sites
  • Recurring scheduled routes between subdivisions and equipment yards
  • Same-day and next-day dispatch available
  • Flat-rate per-move pricing — firm quote before we roll
  • Full insurance with Certificate of Insurance on request
  • Serving Genesee, Oakland, Livingston, Washtenaw, Lapeer, Shiawassee, and Saginaw counties
EIN82-4883580
USDOT2573313
MC1690083
Transparent Pricing

Rate Structure

Portal-to-portal mileage. One flat per-mile rate — no separate deadhead charges. Firm quote before we roll.

Base Rates

Hookup / load fee$300
Per mile (round trip)$4.00/mi
Minimum job charge$400

Add-Ons

Additional machine+$150
Gang box / job box+$100
Loose attachments (each)+$50

Surcharges

Wait time beyond 30 min$75/hr
After-hours / weekend+50%
Permits & escortsAt cost
Coverage
